---
title: "Development"
---
::: {.callout-tip collapse=true}
# Learning Goals: Development
(To be added)

:::

| Date | Topic | Reading | Slides |
| - | --- | --- | - |
| Tues 10/20 | Typical language acquisition | Newport & Getz 2025 |
| Thurs 10/22 | Critical periods
| Tues 10/27 | Perinatal stroke | Newport et al. 2022 | 
| Thurs 10/29 | Language deprivation | Ferjan Ramirez et al. 2014
| Tues 11/3 | Bilingualism | TBD
| Thurs 11/5 | Bilingualism | TBD
| Tues 11/10 | <span class="exam-badge">Exam #3</span>


**Resources**
